title: GateResult
description: Per-ticket quality-gate result, shared by `check-ac` and `quality-check` under --output json (and the library check_ac/quality_check, which add a convenience `passed`). `verdict` is the canonical pass/fail; gate-specific metrics appear as additional properties — check-ac adds criteria_count; quality-check adds line_count/keyword_count/ac_items/file_impact.
